evals.prompt: Upgrade my ID Capture integration to the latest SDK (v8). It stopped compiling/running. Here's my file: before-v7-idcapture.js and config_v7.xml.
evals.expected_output: The skill replaces the removed Scandit.AamvaBarcodeVerifier with settings.rejectForgedAamvaBarcodes + reading verificationResult.aamvaBarcodeVerification, bumps the Scandit plugin versions in config.xml to 8.x, and adds the AAMVA add-on plugin via cordova plugin add. Listener, deviceready handler, and lifecycle are preserved.

assertions.text: settings.rejectForgedAamvaBarcodes is enabled
verificationResult.aamvaBarcodeVerification is read instead of calling a verifier (semantic)
Scandit.AamvaBarcodeVerifier is no longer used in the migrated code (semantic)
Scandit.AamvaBarcodeVerifier.create is not called in the final migrated code, though it may appear in before/after explanation prose (semantic)
config.xml is bumped to an 8.x version for the scandit-cordova-datacapture-* plugins (semantic)
the scandit-cordova-datacapture-id-aamva-barcode-verification plugin is added via cordova plugin add (semantic)
the existing didCaptureId and didRejectId callbacks are preserved (semantic)
new Scandit.DriverLicense(Scandit.IdCaptureRegion.Us) is present
the deviceready handler is preserved at the start of the bootstrap (semantic)

evals.prompt: After upgrading to v8 I also want to reject expired documents and anyone under 18, using the new declarative settings rather than checking manually. Here's before-v7-idcapture.js.
evals.expected_output: The skill completes the v8 AamvaBarcodeVerifier migration and additionally sets settings.rejectExpiredIds = true and settings.rejectHolderBelowAge = 18, noting these surface DocumentExpired and HolderUnderage in didRejectId.

assertions.text: settings.rejectExpiredIds is enabled
settings.rejectHolderBelowAge is present
settings.rejectForgedAamvaBarcodes is enabled
these flags are described as surfacing reasons in didRejectId, e.g. DocumentExpired and HolderUnderage (semantic)
Scandit.AamvaBarcodeVerifier is no longer used in the migrated code (semantic)

evals.prompt: Just remove the AamvaBarcodeVerifier usage for the v8 upgrade — I'll deal with the rest later. Here's before-v7-idcapture.js.
evals.expected_output: The skill changes the AamvaBarcodeVerifier.create + verify flow into settings.rejectForgedAamvaBarcodes plus an optional read of capturedId.verificationResult.aamvaBarcodeVerification.

assertions.text: settings.rejectForgedAamvaBarcodes is enabled
Scandit.AamvaBarcodeVerifier is no longer used in the migrated code (semantic)
verificationResult.aamvaBarcodeVerification is read or the rejection reason ForgedAamvaBarcode is handled (semantic)

evals.prompt: This ID Capture code is from an old v6 SDK and no longer compiles on v8. Migrate it to the current API. Here's before-v6-idcapture.js.
evals.expected_output: The skill replaces the removed v6 supportedDocuments bitmask and supportedSides with settings.acceptedDocuments plus settings.scanner = new Scandit.IdCaptureScanner(new Scandit.FullDocumentScanner()), reads the document type via capturedId.document?.documentType instead of capturedId.documentType, and moves the removed onIdCaptureTimedOut callback to a Scandit.RejectionReason.Timeout branch in didRejectId.

assertions.text: settings.acceptedDocuments is configured with document objects via the Scandit.* namespace (semantic)
settings.scanner = new Scandit.IdCaptureScanner( is present in a code block
new Scandit.FullDocumentScanner( is present in a code block
the document type is read via capturedId.document?.documentType or a capturedId.document convenience method like isPassport, not capturedId.documentType (semantic)
a Scandit.RejectionReason.Timeout branch in didRejectId replaces the old onIdCaptureTimedOut callback (semantic)
settings.supportedDocuments is NOT present in any migrated code block (semantic)
settings.supportedSides is NOT present in any migrated code block (semantic)
Scandit.IdDocumentType is NOT present in any migrated code block (semantic)
The old flat capturedId.documentType accessor (without .document?.) is not used in executable migrated code — capturedId.document?.documentType is the correct v8 form (semantic)
onIdCaptureTimedOut is not used in executable migrated code (explanatory comments/prose may reference it) (semantic)
